AxmCarService/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.4.2 to align with the Java 21 migration target.
AxmCarService/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.1.x may not fully support or optimize for Java 21 features; upgrading ensures compatibility with the new JDK baseline.

AxmCarService/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to enforce compilation against the new JDK.
AxmCarService/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 17, potentially missing Java 21 specific checks or optimizations, and failing if the build environment enforces JDK 21.
